2603.22837.title: Analysing LLM Persona Generation and Fairness Interpretation in Polarised Geopolitical Contexts
2603.22837.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly utilised for social simulation and persona generation, necessitating an understanding of how they represent geopolitical identities. In this paper, we analyse personas generated for Palestinian and Israeli identities by five popular LLMs across 640 experimental conditions, varying context (war vs non-war) and assigned roles. We observe significant distributional patterns in the generated attributes: Palestinian profiles in war contexts are frequently associated with lower socioeconomic status and survival-oriented roles, whereas Israeli profiles predominantly retain middle-class status and specialised professional attributes. When prompted with explicit instructions to avoid harmful assumptions, models exhibit diverse distributional changes, e.g., marked increases in non-binary gender inferences or a convergence toward generic occupational roles (e.g., "student"), while the underlying socioeconomic distinctions often remain. Furthermore, analysis of reasoning traces reveals an interesting dynamics between model reasoning and generation: while rationales consistently mention fairness-related concepts, the final generated personas follow the aforementioned diverse distributional changes. These findings illustrate a picture of how models interpret geopolitical contexts, while suggesting that they process fairness and adjust in varied ways; there is no consistent, direct translation of fairness concepts into representative outcomes.
2603.22837.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）越來越多地被用於社會模擬和角色生成，這需要理解它們如何表現地緣政治身份。<lb/>在本文中，我們分析了五個流行的LLM在640個實驗條件下生成的巴勒斯坦和以色列身份的角色，這些條件變化了背景（戰爭與非戰爭）和分配的角色。<lb/>我們觀察到生成屬性的顯著分佈模式：在戰爭背景下，巴勒斯坦的角色經常與較低的社會經濟地位和以生存為導向的角色相關聯，而以色列的角色則主要保持中產階級地位和專業屬性。<lb/>當被要求明確避免有害假設時，模型表現出多樣的分佈變化，例如，非二元性別推斷的顯著增加或向一般職業角色（例如“學生”）的趨同，而潛在的社會經濟區別往往仍然存在。<lb/>此外，對推理痕跡的分析揭示了模型推理和生成之間有趣的動態：雖然理由始終提到與公平相關的概念，但最終生成的角色遵循上述多樣的分佈變化。<lb/>這些發現描繪了模型如何解釋地緣政治背景，同時表明它們以不同的方式處理公平並進行調整；公平概念並沒有一致地、直接地轉化為代表性結果。
2603.22837.author: Maida Aizaz et.al.
